Official MoU Signed Disaster Management March 2026

UDAAN × NDRRMA — Disaster Management Partnership

UDAAN officially signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the National Disaster Risk Reduction & Management Authority for disaster management and emergency rescue operations.

handshake Formal MoU
emergency Emergency Rescue
MoU Official Agreement
NDRRMA Government Partner
UAS Drone Deployment
Rescue Emergency Ops
Partnership Overview

Partnership Focus

This partnership strengthens Nepal's capacity to deploy unmanned aircraft systems in disaster response — combining UDAAN's drone expertise with NDRRMA's national mandate for risk reduction, preparedness, and emergency rescue.

  • emergency Disaster management coordination using drone technology
  • helicopter Emergency rescue operations and aerial situational awareness
  • handshake Formal MoU between UDAAN and NDRRMA under Government of Nepal
  • shield Building safer, faster, and more effective disaster response capabilities

Article Details

calendar_today

Date

March 2026

account_balance

Partner

National Disaster Risk Reduction & Management Authority (NDRRMA)

description

Agreement Type

Memorandum of Understanding (MoU)
